description: HIPAA-regulated healthcare orgs. Posture historically softer than finance due to legacy device prevalence; MFA coverage trails. Patch lag is the dominant exposure factor.

citations.safe_score: HHS OCR breach portal 2024-2025 + IBM Cost of a Data Breach Report 2025, healthcare section ($10.93M avg breach cost — highest of any vertical).
citations.open_critical: NVD CVE distribution intersected with common healthcare vendor list (Epic, Cerner, Philips, GE Healthcare). CISA KEV catalog filtered to medical devices.
citations.open_high: Same NVD/KEV intersection at HIGH severity.
citations.drift_events_per_week: Mandiant M-Trends 2025, healthcare section; lower than finance due to slower change cadence.
citations.mean_time_to_remediate_days: IBM Cost of a Data Breach 2025 healthcare section: 277-day average breach lifecycle.
citations.mfa_coverage_pct: Microsoft Digital Defense Report 2025 + HIMSS Cybersecurity Survey 2024.
citations.patch_lag_days: Qualys TruRisk Research 2025 + HHS 405(d) Task Group guidance on legacy device patching.
citations.nhi_growth_rate_pct: CyberArk Identity Security Threat Report 2025; healthcare NHI growth trails general industry.
